title: solidago × lutea
intro: Solidago × lutea, also known as the yellow-leaved goldenrod, is a hybrid plant in the aster family that combines the characteristics of Solidago altissima and S. squarrosa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Solidago × lutea include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
